title: ortholoma peruvianum
intro: Ortholoma peruvianum, also known as Peruvian gromwell, is a type of flowering plant native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ortholoma peruvianum include its ability to soothe skin conditions, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Ortholoma peruvianum include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health issues, including acne, eczema, and wounds.
